# FFmpeg colour-enum code points — vendored for `cargo xtask check`.
# Source: FFmpeg n8.1 libavutil/pixfmt.h
# Fetched: 2026-05-20
#
# Regenerate via `cargo xtask sync` after bumping the FFMPEG_TAG constant.
# One `<ENUM> <FFMPEG_NAME> <VALUE>` per line; AVColor*/AVChroma* enums,
# C-counter rules. *_NB sentinels, the post-NB custom EXT extensions,
# and the RESERVED*-prefix stripped names are kept verbatim; aliases
# collapse to the first name seen for each distinct value.

Primaries RESERVED0 0
Primaries BT709 1
Primaries UNSPECIFIED 2
Primaries RESERVED 3
Primaries BT470M 4
Primaries BT470BG 5
Primaries SMPTE170M 6
Primaries SMPTE240M 7
Primaries FILM 8
Primaries BT2020 9
Primaries SMPTE428 10
Primaries SMPTE431 11
Primaries SMPTE432 12
Primaries EBU3213 22
Transfer RESERVED0 0
Transfer BT709 1
Transfer UNSPECIFIED 2
Transfer RESERVED 3
Transfer GAMMA22 4
Transfer GAMMA28 5
Transfer SMPTE170M 6
Transfer SMPTE240M 7
Transfer LINEAR 8
Transfer LOG 9
Transfer LOG_SQRT 10
Transfer IEC61966_2_4 11
Transfer BT1361_ECG 12
Transfer IEC61966_2_1 13
Transfer BT2020_10 14
Transfer BT2020_12 15
Transfer SMPTE2084 16
Transfer SMPTE428 17
Transfer ARIB_STD_B67 18
Matrix RGB 0
Matrix BT709 1
Matrix UNSPECIFIED 2
Matrix RESERVED 3
Matrix FCC 4
Matrix BT470BG 5
Matrix SMPTE170M 6
Matrix SMPTE240M 7
Matrix YCGCO 8
Matrix BT2020_NCL 9
Matrix BT2020_CL 10
Matrix SMPTE2085 11
Matrix CHROMA_DERIVED_NCL 12
Matrix CHROMA_DERIVED_CL 13
Matrix ICTCP 14
Matrix IPT_C2 15
Matrix YCGCO_RE 16
Matrix YCGCO_RO 17
DynamicRange UNSPECIFIED 0
DynamicRange MPEG 1
DynamicRange JPEG 2
ChromaLocation UNSPECIFIED 0
ChromaLocation LEFT 1
ChromaLocation CENTER 2
ChromaLocation TOPLEFT 3
ChromaLocation TOP 4
ChromaLocation BOTTOMLEFT 5
ChromaLocation BOTTOM 6
